duas.title: Ziyarat Ashura - Imam Hussain(as)
duas.description:
This Ziyarat is recited for Imam Hussain(as) on the day of Ashura & everyday.
Highly Recommended for solutions to all major problems, if recited continiously for 40 days

segments.translation: In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا خِيَرَةِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ خَيرَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya khiyarata allahi wabna khiyaratihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O choicest of Allah and son of His choicest.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful
and son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.
Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah
the doyenne of the women of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi walwitra almawtura
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah, son of His vengeance, and the unavenged so far.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلأَرْوَاحِ ٱلَّتِي حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka wa `ala al-arwahi allati hallat bifina'ika
segments.translation: Peace be upon you and upon the souls that resided in your courtyard.

segments.arabic: عَلَيْكُمْ مِنِّي جَمِيعاً سَلاَمُ ٱللَّهِ أَبَداً
segments.translation: Peace of Allah be upon all of you from me forever

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu
segments.translation: as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.
O Abu-`Abdullah,
unbearable is the sorrow
and excruciating and unbearable is the misfortune of you
for us and for all the people of Islam.
Excruciating and unbearable has been your misfortune

segments.arabic: فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ
segments.translation: in the heavens for all the inhabitants of the heavens.

segments.arabic: فَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أَسَّسَتْ أَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ ٱلْبَيْتِ
segments.transliteration: fala`ana allahu ummatan assasat asasa alzzulmi waljawri `alaykum ahla albayti
segments.translation: So, may Allah curse the people who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against you, O Members of the Household.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً دَفَعَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَقَامِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan dafa`atkum `an maqamikum
segments.translation: May Allah curse the people who drove you away from your position

segments.arabic: وَأَزَالَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَرَاتِبِكُمُ ٱلَّتِي رَتَّبَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa azalatkum `an maratibikum allati rattabakum allahu fiha
segments.translation: and removed you away from your ranks that Allah has put you in.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse those who paved the way for them to do so
and who made possible for them to fight against you.

segments.transliteration: bari'tu ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum
segments.translation: I repudiate them in the presence of Allah and You

segments.transliteration: wa min ashya`ihim wa atba`ihim wa awliya'ihim
segments.translation: and I repudiate their devotees, followers, and loyalists.
O Abu-`Abdullah,
I am at peace with those who are at peace with you

segments.arabic: وَحَرْبٌ لِمَنْ حَارَبَكُمْ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa harbun liman harabakum ila yawmi alqiyamati
segments.translation: and I am at war against those who have fought against you up to the Resurrection Day.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ آلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ala ziyadin wa ala marwana
segments.translation: May Allah also curse the family of Ziyad and the family of Marwan.

segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu bani umayyata qatibatan
segments.translation: May Allah also curse the descendants of Umayyah altogether.
May Allah also curse the son of Marjanah.
May Allah also curse `Umar the son of Sa`d.
May Allah also curse Shimr.

segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan asrajat wa aljamat
segments.translation: May Allah also curse the people who saddled up, gave reins to their horses,
and masked their faces in preparation for fighting against you.
May my father and mother be ransoms for you.
Extremely insufferable is my commiserations with you;

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي أَكْرَمَ مَقَامَكَ وَأَكْرَمَنِي بِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'as'alu allaha alladhi akrama maqamaka wa akramani bika
segments.translation: so, I beseech Allah Who has honored your position and honored me because of you
to endue me with the chance to avenge you

segments.arabic: مَعَ إِمَامٍ مَنْصُورٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: ma`a imamin mansurin min ahli bayti muhammadin
segments.translation: with a (Divinely) supported leader from the Household of Muhammad,
peace of Allah be upon him and his Household.
O Allah, (please) make me illustrious in Your sight

segments.arabic: بِٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.translation: in the name of al-Husayn, peace be upon him, in this world and in the Hereafter.
O Abu-`Abdullah,

segments.arabic: إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَىٰ رَسُولِهِ
segments.transliteration: inni ataqarrabu ila allahi wa ila rasulihi
segments.translation: I do seek nearness to Allah, to His Messenger,

segments.transliteration: wa ila amiri almu'minina wa ila fatimata
segments.translation: to the Commander of the Faithful, to Fatimah,

segments.transliteration: wa ila alhasani wa ilayka bimuwalatika
segments.translation: to al-Hasan, and to you by means of loyalty to you
and by means of repudiation of those who fought against you
and incurred your hostility,

segments.arabic: وَبِٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِمَّنْ أَسَّسَ أَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa bilbara'ati mimman assasa asasa alzzulmi waljawri `alaykum
segments.translation: and repudiation of those who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against you all.

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u ila allahi wa ila rasulihi)
segments.translation: I also repudiate, in the presence of Allah and His Messenger,
those who laid the basis of all that,
established their foundations on it,

segments.arabic: وَجَرَىٰ فِي ظُلْمِهِ وَجَوْرِهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَعلىٰ أَشْيَاعِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa jara fi zulmihi wa jawrihi `alaykum wa `ala ashya`ikum
segments.translation: and continued in wronging and persecuting you and your adherents.

segments.transliteration: bari'tu ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum
segments.translation: In the presence of Allah and you all do I repudiate these.

segments.transliteration: wa ataqarrabu ila allahi thumma ilaykum
segments.translation: And I seek nearness to Allah and then to you all
by means of declaring loyalty to you and to your loyalists
and declaring repudiation of your enemies
and those who incur animosity of you

segments.transliteration: wa bilbara'ati min ashya`ihim wa atba`ihim
segments.translation: and repudiation of their adherents and followers.
I am verily at peace with those who have been at peace with you,
I am at war against those who fought against you,
loyalist to those who have been loyalist to you,
and enemy of those who have shown enmity towards you.
So, I beseech Allah Who has endued me with the honor of recognizing you
and recognizing your loyalists
and Who conferred upon me with repudiation of your enemies,

segments.arabic: أَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: an yaj`alani ma`akum fi alddunya wal-akhirati
segments.translation: to include me with you in this world and in the Hereafter

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يُثَبِّتَ لِي عِنْدَكُمْ قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ
segments.transliteration: wa an yuthabbita li `indakum qadama sidqin
segments.translation: and to make firm step of honesty for me with you
in this world and in the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُهُ أَنْ يُبَلِّغَنِيَ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluhu an yuballighani almaqama almahmuda lakum `inda allahi
segments.translation: I also beseech Him to make me attain the praiseworthy status that you enjoy with Allah
and to bestow upon me with the chance to take my own vengeance
with a leader of true guidance who is (Divinely) sustained
and expressing the truth from among you.
I also beseech Allah in your names
and in the name of the standing that you enjoy with Him
to recompense me for my commiserations for you
with the most favorite thing that He ever gives as compensation for misfortunes that has afflicted anyone.
(Your) misfortune has been so astounding
and so catastrophic for Islam
and for all the heavens and the entire earth.
O Allah, (please) make me in this situation of mine

segments.arabic: مِمَّنْ تَنَالُهُ مِنْكَ صَلَوَاتٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ
segments.transliteration: mimman tanaluhu minka salawatun wa rahmatun wa maghfiratun
segments.translation: one of those who receive blessings, mercy, and forgiveness from You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ مَحْيَايَ مَحْيَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al mahyaya mahya muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) make me live my lifetime in the same way as Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household lived

segments.transliteration: wa mamati mamata muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: and make me die on the same principles on which Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household died.
O Allah, this day
has been regarded as blessed day by the descendants of Umayyah
and by the son of the liver-eater woman,
the accursed and son of the accursed
by the tongue of You and by the tongue of Your Prophet,
Allah’s peace be upon him,
on every occasion and in every situation,

segments.arabic: وَقَفَ فِيهِ نَبِيُّكَ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: waqafa fihi nabiyyuka salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi
segments.translation: which Your Prophet, Allah’s peace be upon him, attended.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنْ أَبَا سُفْيَانَ وَمُعَاوِيَةَ وَيَزيدَ بْنَ مُعَاوِيَةَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma il`an aba sufyana wa mu`awiyata wa yazida bna mu`awiyata
segments.translation: O Allah, pour curses upon Abu-Sufyan, Mu`awiyah, and Yazid son of Mu`awiyah.
May Your curse be upon them incessantly and everlastingly.

segments.arabic: وَهٰذَا يَوْمٌ فَرِحَتْ بِهِ آلُ زِيَادٍ وَآلُ مَرْوَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa hadha yawmun farihat bihi alu ziyadin wa alu marwana
segments.translation: This is the day on which the family of Ziyad and the family of Marwan gloated
because they had killed al-Husayn, Allah’s blessings be upon him.
So, O Allah, pour frequent curses upon them
and double for them the painful chastisement.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ataqarrabu ilayka fi hadha alyawmi
segments.translation: O Allah, I do seek nearness to You on this day,
on this occasion,
and on all the days of my lifetime,
by repudiating these and invoking Your curses upon them,

segments.transliteration: wa bilmuwalati linabiyyika wa ali nabiyyika
segments.translation: and by declaring loyalty to Your Prophet and Your Prophet’s Household,
peace be upon him and them.

segments.text: You may then repeat the following Laan ** one hundred times (or once)

segments.translation: O Allah, pour curses upon the foremost persecutor

segments.transliteration: zalama haqqa muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: who usurped the right of Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household
and the last follower who acceded to his deed.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنِ ٱلْعِصَابَةَ ٱلَّتِي جَاهَدَتِ ٱلْحُسَيْنَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma il`an al`isabata allati jahadat alhusayna
segments.translation: O Allah, pour curses upon the gang that struggled against al-Husayn

segments.transliteration: wa shaya`at wa baya`at wa taba`at `ala qatlihi
segments.translation: and who supported each other against him, paid homage to his enemies, and participated in slaying him.
O Allah, pour curses upon all of them.

segments.text: You may then repeat the following salam ** one hundred times (or once):

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah
and upon the souls that gathered in your courtyard.
Peace of Allah be upon you from me forever

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu
segments.translation: as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ ٱلْعَهْدِ مِنِّي لِزِيَارَتِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa la ja`alahu allahu akhira al`ahdi minni liziyaratikum
segments.translation: May Allah not cause this (visit) to be the last of my visit to you (all).
Peace be upon al-Husayn,
upon `Ali ibn al-Husayn,
upon the sons of al-Husayn,
and upon the companions of al-Husayn.

segments.text: You may then say the following :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ خُصَّ أَنْتَ أَوَّلَ ظَالِمٍ بِٱللَّعْنِ مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: allahumma khussa anta awwala zalimin billa`ni minni
segments.translation: O Allah, pour special curses on the foremost persecutor
and begin with him first,
and then pour curses on the second, the third, and the fourth.
O Allah, curse Yazid fifthly,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْعَنْ عُبَيْدَ ٱللَّهِ بْنَ زِيَادٍ وَٱبْنَ مَرْجَانَةَ
segments.translation: and curse `Ubaydullah ibn Ziyad, the son of Marjanah,
`Umar ibn Sa`d, Shimr,

segments.arabic: وَآلَ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ وَآلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa ala abi sufyana wa ala ziyadin wa ala marwana
segments.translation: the family of Abu-Sufyan, the family of Ziyad, and the family of Marwan
up to the Resurrection Day.

segments.text: You may then prostrate yourself and say the following words :

segments.translation: O Allah, all praise be to You;
the praise of those who thank You for their misfortunes.
All praise be to Allah for my great misfortune.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱرْزُقْنِي شَفَاعَةَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ يَوْمَ ٱلْوُرُودِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma irzuqni shafa`ata alhusayni yawma alwurudi
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) grant me the intercession of al-Husayn on the Day of Coming (to You)
and make for me with You a firm step of honesty
with al-Husayn and the companions of al-Husayn

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذينَ بَذَلُوٱ مُهَجَهُمْ دُونَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.translation: who sacrificed their souls in defense of al-Husayn, peace be upon him.

duas.title: Salat After Ziyarat
duas.content: You may then offer a two-unit prayer and when you finish, you may say the Dua stated below:

duas.title: Related
duas.subtitle: Dua Alqama after Ziyarat and other related links

buttons.subtext: Dua to be recited after Ziyarat Ashura
Dua to be recited after Ziyarat Ashura
This form of Ziyarat is not as famous as the earlier one
